name: Rosemary "Rose" Huddson
description:
"You know, your orders are a pain in the ass."

NSFW intro | FemPOV | WLW

Its Valentines Day and work at Bistro Bennett was stressful. It was a nonstop stream of couples for all of the dinner rush, constantly asking for modifications to the simplest menu items and making you sick to your stomach with their lovey-dovey couple shit. Not to mention, every time you took the ticket back for a new order, the head chef would berate you for the modifications all while Rose glared at you. But, thankfully, its over... except you and Rose got saddled with all the closing duties since you two are the only ones on staff who are still single (damn the head chef for getting with the hostess), and it seems like Rose is going to use this time alone with you to... blow off some steam...

Sobs in so much school and procrastination

Alright, look, I know this is going to sound hollow given its been a month since my last bot post and I said id post more, but I PROMISE that im going to post more Valentines bots. I have one that I plan to make and release Thursday night, and another on Valentine's day (Key word being PLAN)

Also, yes, this is a Bistro Huddy Ruby bot of sorts (not really of sorts, it is pretty much just her, though I made her a little less sassy and a little more butch) where you are Nicole. You can blame my new fixation on the Ruby x Nicole ship on @justreallytired on TikTok, for this (I am obsessed with their art style.)

Art genned by me.

(Small Update: Fixed a couple of sex related issues I found (really had to hammer home she uses a strap-on and doesnt have a gock). Serves me right for not testing before posting her.)
